headline: ECB signals rate hold through 2026 as inflation remains under control
analysis: ECB data reinforces stable inflation expectations. Traders pricing in no rate changes throughout 2026. Supports EUR stability but limits upside.

headline: EUR/USD holds key support at 1.1800 amid range-bound trading
analysis: EUR/USD consolidating at critical support level after US macro data release. Tight range suggests low volatility ahead. Key levels: 1.1600 support, 1.2000 resistance.

headline: Bitcoin surges 5.48% to $68,434 on positive macro sentiment
analysis: BTC up +5.48% in 24h. Price approaching $70k. Analysts cite short squeeze and positive sentiment from State of the Union address. Total crypto volume +4.4% to $372B.

headline: S&P 500 climbs 0.88% toward 7,000 milestone; Nasdaq leads with 1.1% gain
analysis: US indices rally on tech rebound. S&P 500 at 6,951 inching toward psychological 7,000 level. NASDAQ up 1.1% at 22,864. Investors reassessing AI disruption fears. Back-to-back gains for major averages.

headline: European stocks rally: STOXX 600 +0.59%, DAX positive, IBEX 35 +0.87%
analysis: Regional bourses gain momentum. STOXX 600 +0.59%, IBEX 35 +0.87%, FTSE 100 +0.79%. Rally follows reassessment of Trump tariff landscape and improved risk sentiment.

headline: Gold trades near $5,121/oz; JPMorgan targets $6,300 by end-2026
analysis: Gold at $5,121 (up $29 from previous day, +$2,206 YoY). Volatility expected from geopolitical tensions and rate changes. Inflation expectations support prices; stronger dollar may cap gains. JPMorgan bullish case targets $6,300.

headline: Silver +3.4%, Copper +1.6%; commodities rally on growth optimism
analysis: Industrial metals rally. Silver +3.4% to $90.50, Copper +1.6% to $6.0235. Rally suggests improving growth expectations and real demand recovery.

headline: IMF projects 2.4% US growth for 2026; unemployment to remain ~4%
analysis: IMF Article IV review maintains 2.4% GDP growth forecast for 2026. Unemployment expected near 4% through 2027. Growth trajectory remains moderate; no concerns about overheating or major slowdown.

headline: Nvidia Q4 FY26 earnings reported: $1.62 adjusted EPS, mixed market reaction
analysis: NVDA reported $1.62 adjusted EPS for Q4 FY26. Stock initially rallied in extended trading but pared gains. Jensen Huang commentary on earnings call critical for AI demand outlook. Key date for S&P 500 momentum.

headline: Gold hits $5,174.70; Goldman Sachs $5,400, Wells Fargo $6,100-$6,300 targets for 2026
analysis: Gold +10.06% past month, +74.17% YoY. Major investment banks raising 2026 targets amid central bank buying and macro hedging demand. Geopolitical tensions and real rates support ultra-bullish outlook.

headline: Bitcoin rebounds to $69,000 after short squeeze; altcoins (ETH, SOL, DOGE) surge 10%+
analysis: BTC jumped to $69K in sharp short squeeze after weeks of selling pressure. ETH, SOL, DOGE, ADA rallied 10%+ each. CoinDesk 20 Index bouncing. Crypto-related stocks (Circle, Coinbase) up on momentum. Risk: further consolidation possible.

headline: Trump tariff policy creates market turbulence; Treasury yields fall as inflation expectations ease
analysis: Ongoing tariff uncertainty pressures equities. EU halted trade deal ratification. Traders pricing in lower inflation and faster rate cuts. Mixed sentiment: bearish for exporters, bullish for bonds/USD. Uncertainty premium elevated.

headline: US major indices mixed ahead of Nvidia: S&P 500 6,946 (+0.81%), NASDAQ 23,152 (+1.26%), Dow 49,174 (+0.8%)
analysis: Markets recovering from tariff-driven volatility. Tech outperforming. S&P 500 near 7,000 milestone. Nvidia earnings tonight critical for direction. Positive macro data supporting momentum, but tariff overhang remains.

headline: Post-Nasdaq close: S&P 500 -0.2%, NASDAQ -0.5%, Dow +0.4% after Nvidia earnings disappointment
analysis: Nvidia earnings call failed to assuage AI growth concerns. Stock initially jumped on beats, then reversed hard in extended hours. NASDAQ weakness dragged broader market. S&P 500 closing just above session lows at 6,943. Dow resilience suggests rotation to value/cyclicals.

headline: EUR/USD steady at 1.1800 after ECB Lagarde comments; trade tensions weighing
analysis: EUR/USD consolidates around 1.1800 after volatile day. ECB signals rate pause through 2026. Trade war escalation from Trump admin weighs on USD safe-haven appeal. Risk: further USD weakness if tariff tensions ease.

headline: Bitcoin holds $68.5K support after volatile day; altcoin rallies pause
analysis: BTC at $68,434 in European evening. Short squeeze momentum cooling. 24h volatility: +5.48% net. ETH, SOL, ADA consolidating after 10%+ intraday gains. Trading volume elevated but directionless. Risk: pullback to $66K on negative macro catalyst.

headline: Gold consolidates near $5,180; geopolitical premium intact
analysis: Gold at $5,179.57 (intraday: +$35 from morning). Volatility elevated from geopolitical news and central bank signaling. Inflation expectations support upside; stronger USD caps gains. Watch for rate cut pricing on next Fed data.

headline: STOXX 600 closes near flatline at 523.4; CAC 40 +0.37%, DAX resilient above 25K
analysis: European close: STOXX 600 flat at 523.40 (-0.02%). CAC 40 +0.37% to 8,590.54 (record high 8,600.84 intraday). DAX above 25,000. FTSE 100 -0.05%. Mixed but resilient. Earnings season supporting pockets; tariff uncertainty limiting broad rallies.
